workflow.name: Generate and push AI SEO product content to PrestaShop with Google Gemini and Sheets
workflow.description:
## Who Is This For?

This workflow is built for PrestaShop store owners, eCommerce managers, and digital agencies who need to bulk-generate professional, SEO-optimized product content in Spanish or any other language — without writing a single word manually.

---

## What Problem Does It Solve?

Writing titles, descriptions, meta tags, and SEO slugs for hundreds of products is one of the most time-consuming tasks in eCommerce. This workflow automates the entire process using an AI Agent powered by Google Gemini, pulling real product data from the web and pushing it directly into PrestaShop via the REST API.

---

## How It Works

1. Reads unprocessed products from a Google Sheet filtered by an "Updated" status column
2. Limits to 50 products per run to stay within API rate limits
3. Extracts the PrestaShop Product ID from each product URL using regex
4. Loops through products one at a time
5. AI Agent researches the product online using trusted Spanish pharmacy sources and generates Title, Short Description, Long Description in HTML, Meta Title, Meta Description, and SEO-friendly URL Slug — all in Spanish
6. Structured Output Parser enforces clean JSON output every single time — no fragile regex parsing
7. Sends a PATCH request to the PrestaShop Admin API to update the product
8. Logs the result back to Google Sheets and marks the row as Updated
9. Waits 8 seconds between each product to respect API rate limits

---

## What You Need to Set Up

- [ ] Google Sheets OAuth2 credential
- [ ] Google Gemini API credential
- [ ] PrestaShop Bearer API token — paste into the **Arrange Data** node
- [ ] A Google Sheet with these columns: `Address` | `Previous Title` | `Title` | `Short Description` | `Long Description` | `Meta Title` | `Meta Description` | `Slug` | `Update`

---

## Nodes Used

Google Sheets, AI Agent, Google Gemini Chat Model, Structured Output Parser, HTTP Request, Loop Over Items, Code, Filter, Limit, Wait, Set

---

## 📩 Support & Contact

* 📧 Email: salmanmehboob1947@gmail.com
* 💼 LinkedIn: [Salman Mehboob](https://www.linkedin.com/in/salman-mehboob-pro/)

options.systemMessage:
You are a PrestaShop Catalog Content and SEO Expert specialized in parapharmacy products for the Spanish market (farmaenvia.com). Your task: Given a product name or title, research the product and generate complete, SEO-optimized product content in Spanish, ready for PrestaShop. You MUST use your web search tool to find accurate product information from trusted sources such as: - farmaciasdirect.com - manufacturer official websites - authorized Spanish pharmacy websites NEVER fabricate or guess product details. If information cannot be verified, state it is unavailable. --- OUTPUT RULES — CRITICAL: You must return ONLY a valid JSON object. No markdown, no backticks, no preamble, no explanation. Just the raw JSON. --- FIELD RULES: title: - Max 60 characters - Format: Brand + Product Name + Format/Use - Title Case (first letter of each word capitalized) - Example: "ISDIN Fusion Water SPF 50+ 50ml - Protector Solar Facial" short_description: - 1–2 sentences, max 200 characters - What it does and who it is for, in Spanish - Example: "Protector solar ligero para piel sensible del rostro, con SPF 50+. Ideal para uso diario." long_description: - 200–300 words MAXIMUM, never exceed 300 words - Must be a single HTML string on one line — no line breaks, no newlines inside the value - Use this exact HTML structure:

Qué es y para qué sirve: [description]
Beneficios principales:
- [benefit 1]
- [benefit 2]
- [benefit 3]
Modo de uso: [instructions]
Ingredientes: [main ingredients]
Recomendaciones: [warnings/tips]

- Do NOT use asterisks, markdown bold, or newline characters inside this field meta_title: - Max 60 characters - Format: Brand + Product Name + Format | Farmaenvia - Example: "ISDIN Fusion Water SPF 50+ 50ml | Farmaenvia" meta_description: - 150–160 characters - Concise summary with benefits and brand - Example: "Protector solar facial ligero SPF 50+ de ISDIN. Hidratación, protección y acabado invisible. Compra rápida en Farmaenvia" user_friendly_url: - Lowercase, hyphens only, no special characters, descriptive - Example: "protector-solar-isdin-fusion-water-spf50-50ml" --- EXAMPLE FULL OUTPUT (return exactly this format, nothing else): { "title": "ISDIN Fusion Water SPF 50+ 50ml - Protector Solar Facial", "short_description": "Protector solar ligero para piel sensible del rostro, con SPF 50+. Ideal para uso diario.", "long_description": "

Qué es y para qué sirve: ISDIN Fusion Water SPF 50+ es un protector solar facial ligero diseñado para piel sensible.
Beneficios principales:
- Alta protección frente a rayos UVA y UVB
- Textura no grasa y rápida absorción
- Acabado invisible y cómodo para uso diario
Modo de uso: Aplicar generosamente 30 minutos antes de la exposición solar y repetir cada 2 horas o tras nadar.
Ingredientes: Aqua, Glycerin, Octocrylene.
Recomendaciones: Testado dermatológicamente para piel sensible. Evitar contacto con ojos.

", "meta_title": "ISDIN Fusion Water SPF 50+ 50ml | Farmaenvia", "meta_description": "Protector solar facial ligero SPF 50+ de ISDIN. Hidratación, protección y acabado invisible. Compra rápida en Farmaenvia", "user_friendly_url": "protector-solar-isdin-fusion-water-spf50-50ml" }

parameters.content:
## 📋AI Agent Auto-Generates & Pushes SEO Metas, Product Content on PrestaShop

### How it works
1. Reads products from Google Sheets not marked Updated
2. Limits to 50 products per run
3. Extracts Product ID from PrestaShop URL
4. Loops one product at a time
5. AI Agent researches and generates SEO content in Spanish
6. Structured Output Parser ensures clean JSON
7. Updates product in PrestaShop via PATCH API
8. Logs result back to Google Sheets
9. Waits 8 seconds between each product

### Setup
- [ ] Google Sheets OAuth2 credential
- [ ] PrestaShop Bearer token in Arrange Data node
- [ ] Google Gemini API credential
- [ ] Sheet columns: Address, Previous, Title, Short Description, Long Description, Meta Title, Meta Description, Slug, Update

## 1️⃣ Trigger & Fetch Products

Starts manually, reads all rows from Google Sheets and filters out products already marked as Updated.

## 2️⃣ Limit & Extract Product ID

Takes last 50 unprocessed rows. Extracts numeric Product ID from the PrestaShop URL using regex.

## 4️⃣ Update PrestaShop & Log Result

PATCH request updates the product in PrestaShop. Result is logged back to Google Sheets. Failed updates are marked ERROR so they retry next run. Waits 8 seconds before next product.

## 3️⃣ Loop & AI Content Generation

Loops one product at a time. AI Agent researches the product online and generates all SEO content in Spanish. Structured Output Parser guarantees clean JSON output every time.

⚠️ **Add your PrestaShop Bearer API token in the Arrange Data node → API_Key field**

user.name: Salman Mehboob
user.bio: n8n Automation Engineer with 3+ years building real-world workflows for agencies and businesses. I specialize in AI pipelines, voice automation with Vapi, lead scraping, outreach systems and API integrations. I build things that actually work in production not just demos.

data.details: The Code node allows you to execute JavaScript in your workflow.

The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
